name: AssemblyAI
firstSuccessOutcome: You run a Python script and see the transcript text of a hosted audio file printed to your terminal.

steps.action: Open AssemblyAI docs quickstart page
Sign up for an AssemblyAI account
Log in to the AssemblyAI dashboard
Copy API key from dashboard
Export ASSEMBLYAI_API_KEY environment variable
Install SDK via pip install assemblyai
Run transcribe.py against hosted sample audio
See transcript text printed in terminal

name: Cerebras Inference
firstSuccessOutcome: You run a Python script and see a chat completion response from a Cerebras-hosted model printed to your terminal.

steps.action: Open Cerebras Inference quickstart page
Sign up or log in to Cloud Console
Create API key under API Keys nav
Export CEREBRAS_API_KEY environment variable
Install SDK via pip install cerebras-cloud-sdk
Run script calling chat.completions.create
See model response printed in terminal

name: Fireworks AI
routeName: Serverless quickstart Python SDK chat completion
firstSuccessOutcome: You run a Python script and see a serverless model response printed to your terminal.

steps.action: Open Fireworks AI serverless quickstart page
Sign up or log in to Fireworks account
Create API key in Fireworks dashboard
Export FIREWORKS_API_KEY environment variable
Install SDK via pip install fireworks-ai
Run script calling chat.completions.create
See model response printed in terminal

name: GroqCloud
firstSuccessOutcome: You run a Python script and see a chat completion response from a Groq-hosted model printed to your terminal.

steps.action: Open GroqCloud docs quickstart page
Sign up or log in to GroqCloud console
Create API key in console
Export GROQ_API_KEY environment variable
Install SDK via pip install groq
Run script calling chat.completions.create
See model response printed in terminal

name: Modal
firstSuccessOutcome: You run modal run hello_world.py and see your function execute remotely on Modal with logs streamed back.

steps.action: Open Modal getting started guide
Create an account at modal.com
Install package via pip install modal
Run modal setup to authenticate via browser
Save hello_world.py with app function
Run modal run hello_world.py
See remote function logs and output

name: Stability AI
routeName: Stable Image Core REST v2beta text-to-image
firstSuccessOutcome: You send a text prompt to the Stable Image Core endpoint and receive a generated image saved to disk.

steps.action: Open Stability AI getting started page
Create account (Google login grants free credits)
Copy API key from API Keys page
POST prompt to stable-image/generate/core endpoint
Receive and save generated image file

name: Weights & Biases
firstSuccessOutcome: You run a script logging metrics with wandb and view accuracy and loss charts in your W&B dashboard.

steps.action: Open W&B quickstart page
Sign up for a W&B account
Create API key at wandb.ai/settings
Install library via pip install wandb
Run wandb login with your API key
Run script calling wandb.init and run.log
View logged metrics in W&B dashboard
